more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Biti spends weekend behind bars following arrest in Mutare, set to appear in court
more.description: OUTSPOKEN opposition politician-cum-lawyer, Tendai Biti, spent the weekend in police custody following his arrest in Mutare, where he was attending a meeting to discuss the contentious Constitutional Amendment Number 3 Bill. The proposed legislation, among other issues, seeks to extend President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s term of office, but the move is facing resistance from pro-democracy groups, [...] The post Biti spends weekend behind bars following arrest in Mutare, set to appear in court appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: All set for national heroes’ triple burial
more.description: Source: All set for national heroes’ triple burial – herald Wallace Ruzvidzo Herald Reporter President Mnangagwa will today preside over the burial of three national heroes, Major-General (Retired) Herbert Chingono, Cde Cosmas Chiringa and war veteran Cde Elison Mupamawonde, at the National Heroes Acre, in a ceremony honouring their contributions to the liberation struggle and [...] The post All set for national heroes’ triple burial appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: New grain sourcing rule cuts imports
more.description: Source: New grain sourcing rule cuts imports – herald Zvamaida Murwira Senior Reporter Millers, stockfeed manufacturers and food processors will from next week be required to source at least 40 percent of their raw materials from local farmers under new regulations aimed at cutting grain imports, boosting domestic production and strengthening Zimbabwe’s agricultural value chains. [...] The post New grain sourcing rule cuts imports appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Job evaluation paves way for health sector salary review
more.description: Source: Job evaluation paves way for health sector salary review – herald Rumbidzayi Zinyuke Senior Health Reporter The Health Service Commission has completed a comprehensive job evaluation exercise for health workers and is now moving to the implementation stage, a key milestone expected to guide the review of salaries and conditions of service across the [...] The post Job evaluation paves way for health sector salary review appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Man City dominates Arsenal to win English League Cup and make statement in Premier League title race
more.description: LONDON – The first major domestic trophy of the season is Manchester City ‘s. And after a dominant 2-0 win against Arsenal in the English League Cup final on Sunday, it may not be the last. Manchester-born Nico O’Reilly sealed victory with both goals in the second half at Wembley Stadium. The win could also [...] The post Man City dominates Arsenal to win English League Cup and make statement in Premier League title race appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Barcelona edges Rayo Vallecano to increase pressure on Real Madrid ahead of capital derby
more.description: BARCELONA, Spain — Barcelona edged Rayo Vallecano 1-0 to increase its lead of the Spanish league and add more pressure on Real Madrid before its key derby against Atletico Madrid later Sunday. Ronald Araújo headed in the winner in the 24th minute at Camp Nou, and Barcelona goalkeeper Joan García’s impressive performance showed why he [...] The post Barcelona edges Rayo Vallecano to increase pressure on Real Madrid ahead of capital derby appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: The Mirage of Muzarabani: The Distance Between Discovery and Delivery
more.description: The Muzarabani gas discovery is being presented to Zimbabweans as a moment of arrival, a geological vindication that the country sits atop untapped energy wealth capable of transforming its economy. The agendas are obvious, and the reality, at least in part, is true. The mostly unexplored Cabora Bassa Basin has yielded a genuine hydrocarbon system [...] The post The Mirage of Muzarabani: The Distance Between Discovery and Delivery appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Prof Welshman Ncube demands Biti’s immediate release
more.description: Professor Welshman Ncube has condemned the arrest of opposition leader, Tendai Biti yesterday as a clear selective application of the law and demanded his immediate release. Biti who is the Constitutional Defenders Forum (CDF) convener was arrested together with journalist Fanuel Chinowaita, Hon Morgan Ncube and Nyasha Gerald in Mutare when they were conducting a [...] The post Prof Welshman Ncube demands Biti’s immediate release appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: The Chivayo Files: The R570 Million Printing Scandal That ZACC Won’t Ever Touch
more.description: Wicknell Chivayo is a name that sparks both envy and outrage in Zimbabwe. To his followers on social media, he is the “Sir Wicknell” who gifts luxury Mercedes-Benz cars to musicians and spends thousands of dollars on flamboyant displays of wealth. But behind the flashy cars and the constant stream of social media giveaways lies [...] The post The Chivayo Files: The R570 Million Printing Scandal That ZACC Won’t Ever Touch first appeared on My Zimbabwe News .

more.title: New HIV drug arrives in Zimbabwe, promising protection but testing health systems after aid cuts
more.description: A new HIV drug has arrived in Zimbabwe, promising protection from the virus that has devastated the population in the past two decades. But there are concerns that testing health systems won't cope, after international aid cuts.
